subject: DNS wildcard `**` in network policies
old: `**` treated as single `*` (matched only one subdomain level)
truth: DNS wildcard `**` in network policies now matches multiple subdomains instead of being treated as a single `*`
quote: DNS wildcard `**` now matches multiple subdomains (previously treated as single `*`).

from_fact: `**` treated as single `*` (matched only one subdomain level)

subject: `FromRequires` and `ToRequires` fields in CiliumNetworkPolicy/CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy
truth: Stop using `FromRequires` and `ToRequires` fields in CiliumNetworkPolicy and CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy as they are no longer permitted
quote: `FromRequires` and `ToRequires` fields are no longer permitted in `CiliumNetworkPolicy` and `CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy`.

subject: Mesh auth flag default (`authentication.enabled`)
truth: The `authentication.enabled` flag now defaults to disabled, so mesh auth will not be active unless explicitly enabled
quote: Mesh auth flag (`authentication.enabled`) now defaults to disabled.

subject: Policy default local cluster behavior
old: network policies selected endpoints across all clusters
new: network policies select endpoints from local cluster only by default
truth: Network policies now select endpoints from local cluster only by default; use `policy-default-local-cluster: false` to retain prior behavior (though this option will be deprecated)
quote: Policy Default Local Cluster: Network policies now select endpoints from local cluster only by default (major behavioral shift). Use `policy-default-local-cluster: false` to retain prior behavior, though this option will be deprecated.

from_fact: network policies selected endpoints across all clusters
network policies select endpoints from local cluster only by default

subject: `clustermesh.apiserver.tls.authMode` default
truth: `clustermesh.apiserver.tls.authMode` now defaults to `migration` mode
quote: `clustermesh.apiserver.tls.authMode` defaults to `migration` mode.

subject: MCS-API CRDs installation default
truth: MCS-API CRDs are now installed by default; set `clustermesh.mcsapi.installCRDs: false` to opt-out
quote: MCS-API CRDs now installed by default; set `clustermesh.mcsapi.installCRDs: false` to opt-out.

subject: `CiliumLoadBalancerIPPool` v2alpha1 API version
truth: Stop using `CiliumLoadBalancerIPPool` with `apiVersion: cilium.io/v2alpha1`; migrate to `apiVersion: cilium.io/v2`
quote: `CiliumLoadBalancerIPPool` v2alpha1 deprecated; migrate to `apiVersion: cilium.io/v2`.

associative: load balancer ip pool api version

subject: `CiliumBGPPeeringPolicy` CRD and BGPv1 control plane
truth: Stop using `CiliumBGPPeeringPolicy` CRD and BGPv1 control plane; migrate to v2 CRDs
quote: `CiliumBGPPeeringPolicy` CRD and BGPv1 control plane removed; migrate to v2 CRDs.

subject: `--bpf-lb-proto-diff` flag
truth: Stop using `--bpf-lb-proto-diff` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--bpf-lb-proto-diff`

subject: `--enable-recorder` and `--hubble-recorder-*` flags (PCAP feature)
truth: Stop using `--enable-recorder` and `--hubble-recorder-*` flags as the PCAP feature has been removed
quote: `--enable-recorder`, `--hubble-recorder-*` (PCAP feature)

subject: `--enable-session-affinity` flag
truth: Stop using `--enable-session-affinity` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--enable-session-affinity`

subject: `--enable-internal-traffic-policy` flag
truth: Stop using `--enable-internal-traffic-policy` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--enable-internal-traffic-policy`

subject: `--enable-svc-source-range-check` flag
truth: Stop using `--enable-svc-source-range-check` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--enable-svc-source-range-check`

subject: `--enable-node-port`, `--enable-host-port`, `--enable-external-ips` flags
truth: Stop using `--enable-node-port`, `--enable-host-port`, and `--enable-external-ips` flags as they have been removed
quote: `--enable-node-port`, `--enable-host-port`, `--enable-external-ips`

subject: `--enable-custom-calls` flag
truth: Stop using `--enable-custom-calls` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--enable-custom-calls`

subject: `--enable-ipv4-egress-gateway` flag
truth: Stop using `--enable-ipv4-egress-gateway` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--enable-ipv4-egress-gateway`

subject: `--egress-multi-home-ip-rule-compat` flag
truth: Stop using `--egress-multi-home-ip-rule-compat` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--egress-multi-home-ip-rule-compat`

subject: `--l2-pod-announcements-interface` flag
truth: Stop using `--l2-pod-announcements-interface` flag as it has been removed
quote: `--l2-pod-announcements-interface`

subject: `--aws-pagination-enabled` flag
truth: Stop using `--aws-pagination-enabled` and use `--aws-max-results-per-call` instead
quote: `--aws-pagination-enabled` → replaced by `--aws-max-results-per-call`

subject: `clustermesh.enableMCSAPISupport` flag
truth: Stop using `clustermesh.enableMCSAPISupport` and use `clustermesh.mcsapi.enabled` instead
quote: `clustermesh.enableMCSAPISupport` → use `clustermesh.mcsapi.enabled`

subject: `encryption.strictMode.*` configuration
truth: Stop using `encryption.strictMode.*` and use `encryption.strictMode.egress.*` instead
quote: `encryption.strictMode.*` → use `encryption.strictMode.egress.*`

subject: `--unmanaged-pod-watcher-interval` format
truth: `--unmanaged-pod-watcher-interval` now requires duration format (e.g. `15s`) instead of integer seconds
quote: `--unmanaged-pod-watcher-interval` changed from integer (seconds) to duration format (e.g., `15s`). Before: `--unmanaged-pod-watcher-interval=15`; After: `--unmanaged-pod-watcher-interval=15s`.

subject: workqueue metrics
truth: Stop using workqueue_adds_total and use cilium_operator_k8s_workqueue_adds_total instead.
quote: workqueue_adds_total → cilium_operator_k8s_workqueue_adds_total

subject: workqueue metrics label
truth: All renamed workqueue metrics changed label queue_name to name, so any PromQL or dashboard referencing queue_name will break.
quote: All renamed workqueue metrics changed label `queue_name` to `name`.

subject: clustermesh global services metrics
truth: Stop using cilium_agent_clustermesh_global_services and use cilium_agent_clustermesh_remote_cluster_services instead.
quote: cilium_agent_clustermesh_global_services → cilium_agent_clustermesh_remote_cluster_services

subject: helm upgrade --reuse-values flag
new: save values to file and pass via -f
truth: Do NOT use --reuse-values flag during minor version upgrades; instead save values to file and pass via -f.
quote: Do NOT use `--reuse-values` flag during minor version upgrades; instead save values to file and pass via `-f`.

from_fact: save values to file and pass via -f

subject: LoadBalancer/ClusterIP traffic behaviour
old: LoadBalancer/ClusterIP traffic accepted regardless of destination port
new: LoadBalancer/ClusterIP traffic dropped if destination port doesn't match provisioned service (north-south direction)
truth: LoadBalancer/ClusterIP traffic is now dropped if the destination port doesn't match the provisioned service in north-south direction, which may break traffic that previously worked.
quote: LoadBalancer/ClusterIP traffic now dropped if destination port doesn't match provisioned service (north-south direction).

from_fact: loadbalancer/clusterip traffic accepted regardless of destination port
loadbalancer/clusterip traffic dropped if destination port doesn't match provisioned service (north-south direction)

subject: CiliumNetworkPolicy matching reserved:init labels
new: CiliumNetworkPolicy cannot match reserved:init labels; use CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy instead
truth: Stop using CiliumNetworkPolicy to match reserved:init labels; convert those policies to CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy by changing the resource type.
quote: `CiliumNetworkPolicy` resources cannot match `reserved:init` labels anymore. Convert these policies to `CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy` by changing the resource type.

from_fact: ciliumnetworkpolicy cannot match reserved:init labels; use ciliumclusterwidenetworkpolicy instead

subject: Cluster name and ID inference for external workloads
old: Cluster name and ID are automatically inferred for external workloads
new: Cluster name and ID are no longer automatically inferred; must be explicitly specified
truth: Stop relying on automatic inference of cluster name and ID for external workloads; explicitly specify them as parameters using Cilium CLI >=v0.15.8.
quote: Cluster name and ID are no longer automatically inferred for external workloads. If different from defaults, they must be explicitly specified as parameters using Cilium CLI >=v0.15.8.

from_fact: cluster name and id are automatically inferred for external workloads
cluster name and id are no longer automatically inferred; must be explicitly specified

subject: enable-endpoint-routes behaviour with enable-local-node-route
new: enable-endpoint-routes now automatically sets enable-local-node-route to false
truth: Stop expecting local node routes to be active when enable-endpoint-routes is enabled; they are now automatically disabled.
quote: `enable-endpoint-routes` now automatically sets `enable-local-node-route` to false, making local node routes redundant when per-endpoint routes are enabled.

from_fact: enable-endpoint-routes now automatically sets enable-local-node-route to false

subject: L7 visibility via Pod annotations
old: L7 visibility can be configured via Pod annotation policy.cilium.io/proxy-visibility
new: L7 visibility via Pod annotations is no longer supported; use L7 policies instead
truth: Stop using the policy.cilium.io/proxy-visibility Pod annotation for L7 visibility; migrate to L7 policies instead.
quote: L7 visibility via Pod annotations (`policy.cilium.io/proxy-visibility`) is no longer supported. Migrate to L7 policies instead.

from_fact: l7 visibility can be configured via pod annotation policy.cilium.io/proxy-visibility
l7 visibility via pod annotations is no longer supported; use l7 policies instead

subject: Gateway API v1beta1 resources
old: Gateway API v1beta1 resources (GatewayClass, Gateway, HTTPRoute) are supported
new: Gateway API v1beta1 resources are no longer supported; use v1 CRDs and resources
truth: Stop using Gateway API v1beta1 resources for GatewayClass, Gateway, and HTTPRoute; ensure v1 CRDs are installed and migrate resources to v1.
quote: Gateway API users should ensure v1 CRDs are installed and migrate resources from v1beta1 to v1 for GatewayClass, Gateway, and HTTPRoute.

from_fact: gateway api v1beta1 resources (gatewayclass, gateway, httproute) are supported
gateway api v1beta1 resources are no longer supported; use v1 crds and resources

subject: Tunnel protocol auto-set to geneve in native routing with DSR+Geneve
old: Tunnel protocol is automatically set to geneve in native routing mode with DSR+Geneve enabled
new: Tunnel protocol is no longer automatically set; must be explicitly configured
truth: Stop relying on automatic tunnel protocol selection when using native routing mode with DSR+Geneve; explicitly configure --tunnel-protocol=geneve or helm value tunnelProtocol=geneve.
quote: Tunnel protocol is no longer automatically set to `geneve` in native routing mode with DSR+Geneve enabled. Explicitly configure `--tunnel-protocol=geneve` or helm value `tunnelProtocol=geneve`.

from_fact: tunnel protocol is automatically set to geneve in native routing mode with dsr+geneve enabled
tunnel protocol is no longer automatically set; must be explicitly configured

subject: CILIUM_PREPEND_IPTABLES_CHAIN environment variable
truth: Stop using the environment variable CILIUM_PREPEND_IPTABLES_CHAIN; use CILIUM_PREPEND_IPTABLES_CHAINS (with trailing S) instead.
quote: The `CILIUM_PREPEND_IPTABLES_CHAIN` environment variable renamed to `CILIUM_PREPEND_IPTABLES_CHAINS` (added trailing "S") to match the CLI flag `--prepend-iptables-chains`.

subject: BPF masquerade failure behaviour
old: BPF masquerade silently falls back to iptables when requirements aren't met
new: BPF masquerade fails initialization with error logging when requirements aren't met
truth: Stop relying on BPF masquerade silently falling back to iptables; it now fails initialization with error logging if NodePort in BPF or socket load-balancing is disabled.
quote: BPF masquerade support now fails initialization with error logging if requirements aren't met (NodePort in BPF disabled or socket load-balancing disabled), rather than silently falling back to iptables.

from_fact: bpf masquerade silently falls back to iptables when requirements aren't met
bpf masquerade fails initialization with error logging when requirements aren't met

subject: cluster-pool-v2beta IPAM mode
truth: Stop using cluster-pool-v2beta IPAM mode; use multi-pool IPAM mode for dynamic Pod CIDR allocation.
quote: `cluster-pool-v2beta` IPAM mode removed; use `multi-pool` IPAM mode for dynamic Pod CIDR allocation.

subject: install-egress-gateway-routes flag
truth: Stop using the install-egress-gateway-routes flag; datapath improvements have eliminated the need for additional routes in ENI environments.
quote: `install-egress-gateway-routes` flag deprecated due to datapath improvements eliminating the need for additional routes in ENI environments.

subject: tunnel option
truth: Stop using the tunnel option; use routing-mode=native instead of tunnel=disabled, or tunnel-protocol=vxlan|geneve instead of tunnel=vxlan|geneve.
quote: `tunnel` option (deprecated in 1.14) removed. Use `routing-mode=native` (formerly `tunnel=disabled`) for native-routing mode or `tunnel-protocol=vxlan|geneve` (formerly `tunnel=vxlan|geneve`) to configure tunneling protocol.

subject: single-cluster-route flag
truth: Stop using the single-cluster-route flag; it has been removed as it was long defunct and undocumented.
quote: `single-cluster-route` flag removed (long defunct and undocumented).

subject: enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options
old: enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options are available
new: enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options are removed
truth: Stop using enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options; they have been removed.
quote: Deprecated options `enable-k8s-event-handover` and `cnp-status-update-interval` removed.

from_fact: enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options are available
enable-k8s-event-handover and cnp-status-update-interval options are removed

subject: Helm values
truth: Stop using clustermesh.apiserver.tls.ca.cert and clustermesh.apiserver.tls.ca.key; use tls.ca.cert and tls.ca.key instead.
quote: `clustermesh.apiserver.tls.ca.cert` and `clustermesh.apiserver.tls.ca.key` removed (deprecated in 1.14); use `tls.ca.cert` and `tls.ca.key`. The `clustermesh-apiserver-ca-cert` secret no longer generated.

subject: Helm values
new: structured definition decoupling repository and tag
truth: Stop passing plain string image values for spire agent/server; use structured definition with separate repository and tag fields.
quote: `authentication.mutual.spire.install.agent.image` and `authentication.mutual.spire.install.server.image` changed type from string to structured definition decoupling repository and tag.

from_fact: structured definition decoupling repository and tag

subject: Prometheus metrics defaults
old: Prometheus metrics disabled by default for cilium-operator and clustermesh kvstore
truth: Prometheus metrics are now enabled by default for cilium-operator and clustermesh kvstore; explicitly disable with operator.prometheus.enabled=false and clustermesh.apiserver.metrics.etcd.enabled=false if unwanted.
quote: Prometheus metrics now enabled by default for cilium-operator and clustermesh kvstore. Disable with `operator.prometheus.enabled=false` and `clustermesh.apiserver.metrics.etcd.enabled=false`.

from_fact: prometheus metrics disabled by default for cilium-operator and clustermesh kvstore

subject: Helm value
truth: Stop using the tunnel Helm value; use routingMode and tunnelProtocol instead.
quote: `tunnel` helm value removed (deprecated in 1.14); use `routingMode` and `tunnelProtocol`.

subject: Helm values
truth: Stop using enableK8sEventHandover and enableCnpStatusUpdates Helm values; they have been removed.
quote: `enableK8sEventHandover` and `enableCnpStatusUpdates` helm values removed.

subject: Metrics
truth: Stop using cilium_policy_l7_parse_errors_total, cilium_policy_l7_forwarded_total, cilium_policy_l7_denied_total, and cilium_policy_l7_received_total; use cilium_policy_l7_total instead.
quote: `cilium_policy_l7_parse_errors_total`, `cilium_policy_l7_forwarded_total`, `cilium_policy_l7_denied_total`, `cilium_policy_l7_received_total` (replaced by `cilium_policy_l7_total`)

subject: Default value
new: default zero, honoring upstream DNS TTLs
truth: The default --tofqdns-min-ttl changed from 3600 to 0, so DNS TTLs from upstream servers are now honored by default.
quote: Default `--tofqdns-min-ttl` changed from 3600 seconds to zero, now honoring upstream DNS server TTLs by default.

from_fact: default zero, honoring upstream dns ttls

subject: CNI config file name
truth: Cilium now writes to 05-cilium.conflist instead of the previous 05-cilium.conf.
quote: Cilium now writes to `05-cilium.conflist` instead of previous `05-cilium.conf` default.

subject: Default value
truth: The default for --update-ec2-adapter-limit-via-api changed from false to true, requiring ec2:DescribeInstances IAM permission.
quote: `--update-ec2-adapter-limit-via-api` default changed from `false` to `true`, requiring `ec2:DescribeInstances` IAM permission.

subject: Egress Gateway Policy behaviour
old: matching traffic allowed without rerouting when no gateway nodes available
new: matching traffic dropped when no gateway nodes available
truth: Egress Gateway Policy now drops matching traffic when no gateway nodes are available (previously allowed without rerouting).
quote: Matching traffic now dropped when no gateway nodes available (previously allowed without rerouting).

from_fact: matching traffic allowed without rerouting when no gateway nodes available
matching traffic dropped when no gateway nodes available

subject: Gateway API CRDs
truth: Gateway API requires upgrading related CRDs to v0.6.x (ReferenceGrant changed from v1alpha2 to v1beta1).
quote: Requires upgrade of related CRDs to v0.6.x (ReferenceGrant: v1alpha2 → v1beta1).

subject: CiliumNetworkPolicy authentication attribute
truth: Stop using auth.type in CiliumNetworkPolicy Ingress/Egress rules; use authentication.mode instead with values disabled, required, or test-always-fail.
quote: Attribute `auth.type` renamed to `authentication.mode` in Ingress/Egress rules. New valid values: `disabled`, `required`, `test-always-fail`.

subject: Cluster Mesh behaviour
old: agents did not auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection
new: agents auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection
truth: Agents now auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection; upgrade clustermesh-apiserver before Cilium agents to prevent connectivity disruptions.
quote: Agents auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection; upgrade clustermesh-apiserver before Cilium agents to prevent connectivity disruptions.

from_fact: agents did not auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection
agents auto-cleanup stale meshed cluster information after kvstore reconnection

subject: Policy Precedence
old: Deny policies did not always take precedence over allow policies; CIDR-based deny could be overridden by overlapping allow policies
new: Deny policies now always take precedence over allow policies; CIDR-based deny blocks overlapping allow policies
truth: Deny policies now always take precedence over allow policies; CIDR-based deny blocks overlapping allow policies that were previously allowed.
quote: Deny policies now always take precedence over allow policies; CIDR-based deny now blocks overlapping allow policies (previously allowed).

from_fact: deny policies did not always take precedence over allow policies; cidr-based deny could be overridden by overlapping allow policies
deny policies now always take precedence over allow policies; cidr-based deny blocks overlapping allow policies

subject: cilium_host IPv6 assignment
old: cilium_host IPv6 assigned from native host interface
new: cilium_host IPv6 assigned from IPAM pool
truth: cilium_host IPv6 is now assigned from the IPAM pool instead of the native host interface.
quote: cilium_host IPv6 now assigned from IPAM pool rather than native host interface.

from_fact: cilium_host ipv6 assigned from native host interface
cilium_host ipv6 assigned from ipam pool

subject: sockops-enable option
truth: The sockops-enable option has been removed; stop using it.
quote: sockops-enable (deprecated v1.13)

subject: force-local-policy-eval-at-source option
truth: The force-local-policy-eval-at-source option has been removed; stop using it.
quote: force-local-policy-eval-at-source (deprecated v1.13)

subject: disable-cnp-status-updates option
truth: The disable-cnp-status-updates option is removed in v1.15 with no replacement.
quote: disable-cnp-status-updates, cnp-node-status-gc-interval, enable-k8s-event-handover (removed v1.15; no replacement due to scalability issues)

subject: cnp-node-status-gc-interval option
truth: The cnp-node-status-gc-interval option is removed in v1.15 with no replacement.
quote: disable-cnp-status-updates, cnp-node-status-gc-interval, enable-k8s-event-handover (removed v1.15; no replacement due to scalability issues)

subject: Hubble Relay TLS client cert file option
truth: Replace tls-client-cert-file with tls-hubble-client-cert-file for Hubble Relay.
quote: tls-client-cert-file → tls-hubble-client-cert-file

subject: Hubble Relay TLS server key file option
truth: Replace tls-server-key-file with tls-relay-server-key-file for Hubble Relay.
quote: tls-server-key-file → tls-relay-server-key-file

subject: kube-proxy-replacement option values
truth: Replace kube-proxy-replacement values strict/partial/disabled with true/false.
quote: kube-proxy-replacement values strict, partial, disabled (removed v1.15; use true/false)

subject: cilium endpoint regenerate command
truth: The cilium endpoint regenerate command has been removed in v1.15.
quote: cilium endpoint regenerate (removed v1.15)

subject: cilium_operator_ipam_ips metric
truth: Replace cilium_operator_ipam_ips metric with cilium_operator_ipam_available_ips, cilium_operator_ipam_used_ips, and cilium_operator_ipam_needed_ips.
quote: cilium_operator_ipam_ips → cilium_operator_ipam_{available,used,needed}_ips

subject: Hubble Relay securityContext
new: securityContext now applies to container; use podSecurityContext for pod-level
truth: Hubble Relay's securityContext now applies to the container level, not the pod level; use podSecurityContext for pod-level settings.
quote: `securityContext` for Hubble Relay now applies to container (use `podSecurityContext` for pod-level).

from_fact: securitycontext now applies to container; use podsecuritycontext for pod-level

subject: containerRuntime.integration
truth: Stop using containerRuntime.integration; use bpf.autoMount.enabled instead.
quote: `containerRuntime.integration` deprecated → `bpf.autoMount.enabled`.

subject: encryption.* options
truth: Stop using encryption.keyFile, encryption.mountPath, encryption.secretName, encryption.interface; use their encryption.ipsec.* counterparts instead.
quote: `encryption.keyFile`, `encryption.mountPath`, `encryption.secretName`, `encryption.interface` deprecated → `encryption.ipsec.*` counterparts (removed v1.15).

subject: hubble.peerService.enabled
truth: hubble.peerService.enabled is removed.
quote: `hubble.peerService.enabled` removed (was deprecated v1.13).

subject: hubble.tls.ca, hubble.tls.ca.cert, hubble.tls.ca.key
truth: hubble.tls.ca, hubble.tls.ca.cert, and hubble.tls.ca.key are removed.
quote: `hubble.tls.ca`, `hubble.tls.ca.cert`, `hubble.tls.ca.key` removed (was deprecated v1.12).

subject: hubble.ui.securityContext.enabled
truth: hubble.ui.securityContext.enabled is removed.
quote: `hubble.ui.securityContext.enabled` removed (was deprecated v1.12).

subject: ipam.operator.clusterPoolIPv4PodCIDR and clusterPoolIPv6PodCIDR
truth: ipam.operator.clusterPoolIPv4PodCIDR and ipam.operator.clusterPoolIPv6PodCIDR are removed.
quote: `ipam.operator.clusterPoolIPv4PodCIDR`, `ipam.operator.clusterPoolIPv6PodCIDR` removed (was deprecated v1.11).

subject: proxy.prometheus.enabled and proxy.prometheus.port
truth: Stop using proxy.prometheus.enabled and proxy.prometheus.port; use envoy.prometheus.* instead.
quote: `proxy.prometheus.enabled`, `proxy.prometheus.port` deprecated → `envoy.prometheus.*`.

subject: disableEndpointCRD type
truth: disableEndpointCRD is now a boolean instead of a string; remove quotes from the value.
quote: `disableEndpointCRD` now boolean instead of string (remove quotes).

subject: Cilium CLI installation mode
truth: Cilium CLI v0.15.0+ uses Helm installation mode; classic mode is not supported with Cilium v1.14 and the two modes are incompatible, requiring uninstall/reinstall to migrate.
quote: Upgrade Cilium CLI to v0.15.0 or later to switch to Helm installation mode to install and manage Cilium v1.14. Classic installation mode is not supported with Cilium v1.14.
